attributes.action: Take Action to prove you know what is important to UK taxpaying citizens.
attributes.additional_details:
1. Polygamous marriage pay, universal credit increases, etc... no work, no pay !(https://www.manchestereveningnews.co.uk/news/cost-of-living/money-changes-april-2026-including-33692721) 
2. Action on Fuel prices now don't fill the Governments coffers, help the workers out. 
3.Here's one; Haslar Immigration Centre,132 beds £399 million. (https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/haslar-immigration-removal-centre-factsheet/haslar-immigration-removal-centre-irc-factsheet#costs-and-contracts).
attributes.background:
1. Benefits categories are unusual and impose stringent tests and work for those claiming.
2.Take Action and stop profiteering by petrochemical companies and yourselves. A 20p rise per litre in a few days and nothing
3. Stop taxpayers money being spent on asylum/ immigration once and for all.

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament. You may wish to sign some of these open petitions which call for similar action:

'Cap retail oil and gas prices'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764109
'Detain, detect and deport all illegal immigrants'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761984
